top_tweets.text:
First time seeing a W logo change

I see they were inspired by Apple's Liquid Glass design.

A total 180 from the "minimalism" that's ruled the world for the last decade.

Hope other brands add some soul to their logos too

Before:                                   After: https://t.co/DY6tDXGjzb
top_tweets.author: TheRooster
top_tweets.name: Rooster
top_tweets.summary_zh: Xbox 新 logo 採用類似 Apple Liquid Glass 的風格，標誌著設計界可能告別過去十年的極簡主義，開始重新為品牌注入靈魂與質感。

top_tweets.text:
We made it.

The soulless minimalistic flat design era is finally over 🥹

The sun always rises. https://t.co/Fs3JdG5RFK
top_tweets.author: JorgeCastilloPr
top_tweets.name: Jorge Castillo
top_tweets.summary_zh: 呼應 Xbox logo 改版，認為無靈魂的扁平化極簡設計時代終於結束，設計風格正在回歸有溫度的方向。

top_tweets.text:
Google’s level of disrespect is OFF THE CHARTS right now.

Anthropic really thought they had us locked down with Claude Design’s ridiculous rate limits…

…and now Google has literally countered it straight away by open-sourcing DESIGN.md 🤯

https://t.co/9Hq4nLX2GK
top_tweets.author: DataChaz
top_tweets.name: Charly Wargnier
top_tweets.summary_zh: Google 開源 DESIGN.md 直接對抗 Anthropic Claude Design 的嚴格 rate limit，展現競爭策略的快速反應。

top_tweets.text:
not a single person i have ever spoken to uses gemini for coding.

this is still very very weird.

why is gemini so bad at coding when google has scoured the web full of code for decades?
top_tweets.author: signulll
top_tweets.name: signüll
top_tweets.summary_zh: 質疑 Gemini 在程式碼生成上表現不佳的原因：Google 擁有數十年網路程式碼資料，為何產品仍無法與競品競爭？討論中有超過千則回覆反映開發者的實際體驗。

top_tweets.text:
Sualeh Asif, a 26-year-old Pakistani from Karachi, has become a billionaire after his AI coding startup Cursor reached a $29.3 billion valuation.

A former math Olympiad participant who studied at MIT, he is now Chief Product Officer at Anysphere, the company behind Cursor. The https://t.co/J8LRfOwYGj
top_tweets.author: PakStartup
top_tweets.name: Startup Pakistan
top_tweets.summary_zh: 26 歲巴基斯坦裔工程師 Sualeh Asif 透過 AI 程式碼工具 Cursor 成為億萬富翁，目前擔任 Anysphere 首席產品長，Cursor 估值達 293 億美元。

top_tweets.text:
Every single person coding with AI right now:

> Get an idea at 11 PM.

> Build the entire app with Claude by 3 AM.

> Realize you actually have to talk to 
humans to get sales.

> Panic and start a new project to avoid marketing.

Can we coin a term for whatever mental illness
top_tweets.author: zuess05
top_tweets.name: Suhas
top_tweets.summary_zh: 諷刺 AI coding 的典型情境：半夜用 Claude 快速做出產品，卻發現真正困難的是 sales 與 marketing，於是又逃避性地開新專案。反映產品開發者常見的 GTM 焦慮。

top_tweets.text:
🚨 Anthropic's own team just showed how to actually use Claude Code properly.

30 minutes. free. the person who created Claude Code.

watch the workshop. bookmark it.

worth more than every $500 course you almost bought.

you've been using Claude without knowing 40 of its https://t.co/vMY0gE40xl
top_tweets.author: eng_khairallah1
top_tweets.name: Khairallah AL-Awady
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 官方團隊釋出 30 分鐘免費 Claude Code 教學影片，由產品創建者親自示範，內容涵蓋 40 項多數人不知道的功能，實用價值遠超付費課程。

top_tweets.text:
New Anthropic research: Project Deal.

We created a marketplace for employees in our San Francisco office, with one big twist. We tasked Claude with buying, selling and negotiating on our colleagues’ behalf. https://t.co/H2f6cLDlAW
top_tweets.author: AnthropicAI
top_tweets.name: Anthropic
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 發布 Project Deal 研究：在舊金山辦公室建立內部市場，讓 Claude 代表員工進行買賣與談判，測試 AI 的真實商業協作能力。

top_tweets.text:
Auto-review is a new mode that lets Codex work longer with fewer approvals and safer execution.

It helps Codex keep moving through tests, builds, and more, including during long tasks and automations, while a separate agent checks higher-risk steps in context before they run. https://t.co/TCcNC5yB0H
top_tweets.author: OpenAIDevs
top_tweets.name: OpenAI Developers
top_tweets.summary_zh: OpenAI Codex 新增 Auto-review 模式，讓 AI 在長時間任務中減少人工審核、自動通過測試與建構步驟，並由另一個 agent 在執行前檢查高風險操作。

top_tweets.text: update: i told them this is obviously a claude output and that we want the 2 revisions promised in the SOW to be done by a human and they disconnected the slack channel 😩
top_tweets.author: drewfallon12
top_tweets.name: Drew Fallon
top_tweets.summary_zh: 客戶發現外包團隊交付的是 Claude 生成內容，要求依合約由真人完成修訂後，對方直接中斷 Slack 頻道。反映 AI 外包品質與誠信問題。

top_tweets.text: If you asked Claude to build you a house it would build you the most beautiful house, and then you’d go inside and you’d be like, “Claude there’s no bathrooms.” And Claude would say,  “There were no bathrooms before either, so it’s actually a pre-existing issue”
top_tweets.author: allgarbled
top_tweets.name: gabe
top_tweets.summary_zh: 諷刺 Claude 的產品盲點：會為你打造美麗的房子，但進去後發現沒有廁所，AI 會辯稱「之前也沒有，這是既存問題」，反映 AI 對隱含需求的理解不足。

top_tweets.text: idk who needs to hear this but in the year of 2026 instead of dead internet theory we have dead digital job market reality and no one is hiring you without an internal connection or strong credible personal recommendation and job listings and open roles are kind of irrelevant
top_tweets.author: zeta_globin
top_tweets.name: zeta
top_tweets.summary_zh: 2026 年職缺市場已成「死數位市場」，沒有內部推薦或強力人脈幾乎不可能獲聘，公開職缺清單基本失去意義。反映產品與設計職位的求職困境。

top_tweets.text: If you landed your job before 2023, please lead with perspective and empathy when advising people in the current job market. They're in a different battlefield and failures are usually not from lack of trying.
top_tweets.author: OIuwatosin
top_tweets.name: Nathan
top_tweets.summary_zh: 呼籲 2023 年前入職者在建議求職者時保持同理心與視角：當前職場是完全不同的戰場，失敗通常不是不夠努力。

top_tweets.text:
Our design 🆚 ChatGPT  
 I am not afraid for my job https://t.co/OpQVq2CdlV
top_tweets.author: Enelthion
top_tweets.name: Adrián San Gil | G2 Enelthion
top_tweets.summary_zh: 設計師展示自己的作品與 ChatGPT 生成結果對比，表達對 AI 取代設計工作的不擔心，強調人類設計的不可替代性。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: NotchNest AI
top_products.author: Satnam
top_products.tagline: AI powered by Apple Intelligence now in your Notch
top_products.summary_zh: 將 Apple Intelligence 驅動的 AI 助理整合至 MacBook 瀏海區域，讓使用者直接從螢幕頂端存取 AI 功能。

top_products.title: Universal Gas Framework (UGF)
top_products.author: Yash Singh
top_products.summary_zh: 針對區塊鏈開發者的框架，專注於路由操作邏輯而非流動性管理，簡化跨鏈交易開發流程。

top_products.title: Spira AI
top_products.author: Chris Messina
top_products.tagline: AI Influencer that always on trend, create & grow your brand
top_products.summary_zh: AI 虛擬網紅工具，可自動追蹤趨勢並生成內容，協助品牌經營社群媒體與擴大影響力。

top_products.title: Codex 3.0 by OpenAI
top_products.author: Rohan Chaubey
top_products.tagline: Codex can now build, test & debug on autopilot
top_products.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出的程式碼 AI 工具升級版，能自動執行建構、測試與除錯流程，適合開發者提升工作效率。

top_products.title: CodeCanary
top_products.author: Garry Tan
top_products.summary_zh: 分析使用者操作錄影的工具，協助產品團隊從使用行為中找出提升轉換率與營收的機會點。

top_products.title: TuneJourney.com
top_products.author: Binary
top_products.tagline: AI learns your listening habits and curates your live radio
top_products.summary_zh: AI 音樂電台服務，學習使用者聆聽習慣後自動策劃個人化的即時廣播內容。
